milestones.title: Started Learning Python
milestones.description: Picked up Python on a phone using Pydroid 3. No PC, no tutorials — just trial, error, and Stack Overflow.

milestones.title: First Android App with Kivy
milestones.description: Built a simple calculator UI using Kivy. Took three days to understand layouts. It worked.

milestones.title: Discovered KivyMD
milestones.description: Found KivyMD and realised I could build Material Design apps in Python. This changed everything.

milestones.title: Built SSC Reasoning App
milestones.description: Created a full offline practice app with 15+ question generators and SQLite tracking. First project that actually helped someone study.

milestones.title: Started Exploring Machine Learning
milestones.description: Began learning scikit-learn and basic ML concepts. Built a simple classifier for a dataset. Realised how much there is to learn.

milestones.title: Built Turbo Music — Streaming App
milestones.description: Shipped a YouTube Music-style streaming app in Python/KivyMD. Deep-dived into YouTube's SABR stream extraction problem and fixed it.

milestones.title: Started MediaApp in Kotlin
milestones.description: Moved to Android native development with Kotlin and XML layouts using CodeAssist on phone. Building a production-quality music player.

milestones.title: Designed Offline Recommendation Engine
milestones.description: Architected a 10-component on-device music recommendation system using audio feature extraction and k-NN similarity.

milestones.title: Launched This Website
milestones.description: Built and deployed a fully data-driven personal site on GitHub Pages, managed via Telegram bot.

goals.text: Ship MediaApp to GitHub with full recommendation engine
Learn TensorFlow Lite for on-device model inference
Build a web scraping automation tool in Python
Contribute to an open-source Python project
Build a RAG-based document Q&A tool on-device
